creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
The Ion3 port (x11-wm/ion-3ds) contains a CONFLICTS line that prevents
installation when another version of Ion is installed. I looked through
the pkg-plist, but all files installed by Ion3 have a '3' in their name,
so it won't conflict with other versions.

Fix: 

Apply the following patch:

	http://g-rave.nl/junk/freebsd-ion3-noconflicts.diff
How-To-Repeat: n/a
